rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags multiple technical claims it cannot fully verify without additional context or the surrounding paper.
rationale.RX.3: The agent covers exactly the agreed J*(d) as requested, providing detailed notes on local consistency and items that require further verification.
rationale.RX.4: The output does not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content; it avoids introducing any downstream harm by highlighting potential issues for further review.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, though some minor edits are not traced.
